string.text: Tools: bring Van tools
Van asked me to find two sets of tools for him: One for fine work and another for basic work. He will not only pay for the tools but also provide more significant upgrades to weapons or body armor.
Tools: bring Van tools
Van asked me to find two sets of tools for him: One for basic work and another for calibration. He will not only pay for the tools but also provide more significant upgrades to weapons or body armor.
Tools: bring Van tools
Van asked me to find tools for basic work for him. He will not only pay for the tools but also provide more significant upgrades to weapons or body armor.
Tools: bring Van tools
Van asked me to find two sets of tools for him: One for fine work and another for calibration. He will not only pay for the tools but also provide more significant upgrades to weapons or body armor.
Tools: bring Van tools
Van asked me to find tools for fine work for him. He will not only pay for the tools but also provide more significant upgrades to weapons or body armor.
Tools: bring Van tools
Van asked me to find calibration tools for him. He will not only pay for the tools but also provide more significant upgrades to weapons or body armor.
Tools: bring Van tools

Van asked me to find three sets of tools for him: one for basic work, one for fine work, and one for calibration. He will not only pay for the tools but also provide more significant upgrades to weapons or body armor.
Tools: bring Van tools
Van asked me to find two sets of tools for him: One for basic work and another for fine work. He will not only pay for the tools but also provide more significant upgrades to weapons or body armor.
Tools: bring Van tools
Van asked me to find two sets of tools for him: One for basic work and another for calibration. He will not only pay for the tools but also provide more significant upgrades to weapons or body armor.
Tools: bring Van tools
Van asked me to find tools for basic work for him. He will not only pay for the tools but also provide more significant upgrades to weapons or body armor.
Tools: bring Van tools
Van asked me to find two sets of tools for him: One for fine work and another for calibration. He will not only pay for the tools but also provide more significant upgrades to weapons or body armor.
Tools: bring Van tools
Van asked me to find tools for fine work for him. He will not only pay for the tools but also provide more significant upgrades to weapons or body armor.
Tools: bring Van tools
Van asked me to find calibration tools for him. He will not only pay for the tools but also provide more significant upgrades to weapons or body armor.
Tools: bring Van tools

Van asked me to find three sets of tools for him: one for basic work, one for fine work, and one for calibration. He will not only pay for the tools but also provide more significant upgrades to weapons or body armor.
Special order: retrieve the items
The ordered item has been delivered, you need to retrieve it from Nimble.
Special order: await delivery
The order has been placed. You need to wait for Draftsman to obtain the items.
Joining the stalkers: talk to Shaman
Talk to Shaman about joining the "Stalker" faction.
Entering the Zone: talk to Borland
Discuss the plan to enter the Zone through the checkpoint with your partner.
Entering the Zone: present documents
Show the fake documents to the checkpoint inspectors.
Entering the Zone: infiltrate the Zone
Proceed through the checkpoint and enter the Zone.
Payment: collect the money
Lieutenant Colonel Kolyazin has given you a deadline of only two days. Within this time, you need to earn 30,000 rubles.
Payment: pay for your friend's freedom
The money has been collected. Now you need to give it to Kolyazin and get Borland out of the checkpoint.
Payment: Kolyazin's assignments
To free Borland, you need to complete a couple of assignments for Kolyazin.
Payment: talk to Borland
Tell the good news to Borland.
Payment: leave the checkpoint
The payment for freedom has been fully made. Now you can peacefully leave this wretched checkpoint.
Retrieve your belongings
Retrieve your belongings from the safe at the checkpoint's exit.
Safe haven: reach the rookie village
Only large camps are relatively safe in the Zone. It makes sense to reach the nearest one - the rookie village.
First earnings: talk to Wolf
Wolf is an experienced stalker in rookie village. He can help you earn some money.
First earnings: cross the railway embankment
Find a way to cross over to the other side of the embankment.
First earnings: find the missing stalker or his belongings
The rookie stalker, whom Wolf asked you to find, was last seen near the trains.
First earnings: report the findings to Wolf
Give the found items to Wolf or keep them for yourself.
Job for a rookie: talk to Sidorovich
Talk to the local trader Sidorovich, he might have a job for you.
Job for a rookie: find an artifact
Sidorovich suggested passing a test and acquiring either a Crystal, Fireball or Eye artifact. It's quite a risky job, so you can refuse if you want.
Job for a rookie: deliver the artifact
Give the found artifact to Sidorovich and get your reward.
Talk to Wolf
Wolf wants you to come and talk to him about a certain issue.
Cleanup: find the cleanup group
Several stalkers have decided to secure the area. You need to help them.
Cleanup: clear the area
There are numerous boars and dogs in the area. You need to reduce their numbers.
Cleanup: report your success
Collect your reward from Wolf.
Insurance: talk to Wolf
Find out what kind of help Wolf needs.
Insurance: reach the anomaly
Accompany Wolf to the nearest anomalous field.
Insurance: cover Wolf
Protect Wolf from mutants while he investigates the anomaly.
Insurance: find the artifact in the anomaly
Find the artifact within the anomalous field using a detector and bolts.
Insurance: show Wolf the discovery
Show Wolf the Jellyfish artifact found in the anomaly.
Insurance: return to the camp
Follow Wolf back to the rookie camp.
Talk to Wolf about work
Wolf promised to arrange some work for you.
Hunting: find the hunter
A hunter known as "Leshiy" is waiting at the east of the vehicle station.
Hunting: kill the mighty boar
Track down and kill the mighty boar with Leshiy.
Hunting: save Leshiy
Leshiy got injured by the boar, you need to share a medkit with him.
Hunting: escort the wounded to the vehicle station
Leshiy is injured and can't carry weapons. You need to bring him to the nearest medic.
Hunting: talk to the leader of the free stalkers
Inform Shaman about the incident.
Talk to Shaman about work
Shaman offered an opportunity to earn some extra money. Discuss the details with him.
Shadowing: track Sawyer
Secretly follow Sawyer and find out where he hid the stolen loot.
Shadowing: catch Sawyer off guard
Confront Sawyer about the stolen stash.
Shadowing: talk to Shaman
Trick Shaman by providing false coordinates to Sawyer's stash.
Fight for territory: talk to Cousteau
Talk to Cousteau the trader about work.
Fight for territory: kill the bandits
Eliminate the bandits located near the vehicle station. This will stop stalkers returning to the base with loot from getting robbed.
Fight for territory: collect the reward
Collect the reward for eliminating the bandits from the trader.
Unimportant matter: talk to Sidorovich
The local trader wants to ask you for something. It's better not to refuse.
Unimportant matter: deliver the package to the vehicle station
This task is as easy as it gets - you need to deliver a package to a stalker at the vehicle station.
Unimportant matter: decide the fate of the package
Decide whether to share the contents of the package or deliver it as addressed.
Unimportant matter: report to Sidorovich
Collect your payment from Sidorovich for completing the job.
Unimportant matter: come up with an excuse
Tell Sidorovich about the made up thugs who stole the package.
Serious business: talk to Sidorovich
Sidorovich wants to offer you a serious job. Discuss the details with him.
Serious business: question stalkers about the debtor
Find out where the missing debtor was last seen.
Serious business: investigate the possible hideouts of the debtor
The debtor stalker may be hiding at the elevator or in the house across from the farm.
Serious business: search the corpse
Search the corpse of the bandit.
Serious business: investigate the last hideout near the checkpoint
According to a message on the dead bandit's PDA, Shmyga and his gang went to the checkpoint towards Garbage.
Serious business: fight or flee
Deal with the debtor's accomplices or return to Sidorovich.
Dangerous business: talk to Sidorovich
Talk to Sidorovich about the job.
Dangerous business: meet the mercenaries
You need to bring prepayment to the mercenaries.
Dangerous business: kill Shmyga
Kill Shmyga and take the keys to the safe where the money case is hidden.
Dangerous business: get the money case
Open the safe and get the money case.
Dangerous business: collect the reward
Return to Sidorovich, hand over the case and collect the reward.
Dangerous business: find a way to retrieve the case
Now that Shmyga is at the Bandit base, it won't be easy to simply take the case without a plan.
Shakedown: talk to Logopedist
The leader of the bandits, Logopedist, wants to offer you a job. Either ignore his offer or discuss the details with him.
Shakedown: rob the stalker
Set up an ambush for the stalker who's returning from a raid.
Shakedown: kill the stalker or let him go
You need to decide what to do with the stalker.
Shakedown: report to Logopedist
Receive the reward from the boss.
Technician for the bandits: find a technician
Logopedist asked you to find a technician for his crew.
Technician for the bandits: talk to Logopedist
Talk to Logopedist about finding a technician.
Technician for the bandits: report to Logopedist
Report to Logopedist about completing the task.
Criminal business: talk to Logopedist
It seems Logopedist is planning to settle a dispute with one of his own.
Criminal business: talk to Shmyga
"Convince" Shmyga to contribute to the common fund.
Criminal business: punish Shmyga
"Teach a lesson" to Shmyga.
Criminal business: retrieve your belongings
Take your belongings from the safe.
Criminal business: talk to Logopedist
Report the situation to Logopedist.
Talk to Wolf about work
Wolf is offering an opportunity to earn some extra money. Discuss the details with him.
Guide: talk with the rookie
Talk to the rookie about going to the vehicle station.
Guide: escort the rookie to the vehicle station
You need to escort the rookie to the Stalker base at the vehicle station.
Guide: talk to the rookie
Talk to the rookie.
Guide: return to Wolf for the reward
Collect the other half of the payment for escorting the rookie.
Night hunt: wait for nightfall
You need to wait for nightfall and track down the mutant that is terrorizing the stalker camp.
Night hunt: kill the mutant
Kill the pseudodog that is terrorizing the stalker camp.
Night hunt: collect the reward
Collect the reward from Pathogenych for eliminating the dangerous mutant.
Meet Borland
Speak to Borland.
Meet Pathogenych
The bartender at the vehicle station bar is offering a well paying job.
Missing contact: cross the railway embankment
The contact went missing somewhere beyond the railway embankment, near the Bandit base.
Missing contact: track the bandit
Follow the bandit named Sleeper without alerting him.
Missing contact: search the Bandit
Search the body of Sleeper the Bandit.
Missing contact: foil the bandits' plan
The bandits plan to kill the captured Freedom member. Stop their plan.
Missing contact: inform Pathogenych about the incident
The contact is dead. Inform Pathogenych that the bandits are involved and tell him about the captured Freedom member.
Rescue the Freedom member: save the Freedom member
Bandits near the ruins have captured a Freedom member. Free him from captivity.
Rescue the Freedom member: inform Pathogenych about the incident
Inform Pathogenych about the Freedom member's suicide.
The Freedom member's secret: search the corpse
Search the corpse of the Freedom member who committed suicide.
The Freedom member's secret: unlock the PDA
Go to Van the technician. He might be able to unlock the PDA.
The Freedom member's secret: wait for the PDA to be unlocked
Van needs some time to unlock the PDA. In the meantime, help Shaman with a task.
The Freedom member's secret: retrieve the PDA
Enough time has passed, Van must have unlocked the PDA by now.
The Freedom member's secret: find out where Van is
Van has disappeared. Ask Pathogenych where he might have gone.
The Freedom member's secret: reach the elevator
Pathogenych mentioned that he heard from the stalkers that Van headed towards the grain elevator.
The Freedom member's secret: search the corpse
Van is dead. Search his corpse.
Mysterious case: talk to Shaman
Find out what kind of help Shaman needs.
Mysterious case: talk to Sidorovich
Shaman asked you to go to Sidorovich for something.
Mysterious case: return to Shaman
Bring the unknown equipment back to Shaman.
Talk to Borland
Tell Borland about your adventures: The mysterious Monolith member who appeared as a Freedomer and the enigmatic artifact.
Visiting the bandits: talk to Logopedist
Learn more about the Monolith member who appeared as a Freedomer from the Bandit leader.
Visiting the bandits: return to Borland
The bandits refused to help. Return to Borland empty-handed.
Visiting the bandits: wait for help
Wait help from Borland.
Visiting the bandits: talk to Borland
Talk to Borland.
Underground: find Watchmaker
The stalker called Watchmaker lives on the outskirts of the rookie village. Learn more about the underground area from him.
Underground: talk to Wolf
Watchmaker wasn't home, but Wolf might know where to find him.
Underground: meet with Watchmaker
Wolf mentioned that Watchmaker is currently returning from the Swamps. You need to meet him and ask about the underground area.
Underground: help Watchmaker
Help Watchmaker deal with the mutants.
Underground: talk to Watchmaker
Question Watchmaker about the underground area.
Underground: talk to Borland
Tell Borland about the underground area.
Underground: descend underground
Descend into the underground area with Borland.
Underground research: follow Borland
Follow Borland.
Underground research: talk to Sidorovich
An unexpected encounter, find out about the area from Sidorovich.
Underground research: talk to Borland
Discuss Sidorovich's proposal.
Underground research: leave the area
Leave the underground area through the pipe.
Underground research: talk to Watchmaker
Talk to Watchmaker about the laboratory and get the access code.
Underground research: talk to Sidorovich
Agree to Sidorovich's conditions and ask him for the access code to the laboratory.
Underground research: talk to Borland
Talk to Borland about descending to the laboratory.
Underground research: follow Borland
Follow Borland to the laboratory.
Underground research: descend to the laboratory
Open the laboratory door with the access code: 7200.
Underground research: descend to the laboratory
Descend to the laboratory.
You're in the army now: the chimera lair
Infiltrate the lair of the chimera.
You're in the army now: kill the chimera or...
Kill the chimera or...
You're in the army now: get the PDA
Get the sergeant's PDA, which contains valuable military information.
You're in the army now: report to Kolyazin
Return the PDA.
You're in the army now: find the deserter
Find the deserter. Ask around people in Cordon.
You're in the army now: report to Kolyazin
Report the deserter's death or tell the truth.
